privileged_info_summary: The task creates exactly 4 synthetic test feeds with names: test_voltage_check, test_ct_sensor_1, test_calibration_run, and test_mqtt_connection. All test feeds are tagged with 'test'. These feeds are created on-demand during task setup via Emoncms API and are deleted during task execution. The test units are V (voltage_check) and W (CT sensor, calibration run, MQTT connection).
